title: Release agent-utils v1.0.2 for kitty image preview extension
description: Bump the package version and publish a new git tag so Pi users pinned to git:github.com/harryaskham/agent-utils can install the kitty image preview and Tendril screenshot capture extension changes.
creator: ms-mac:agent-utils:5nefmjf5xnxv9naq

title: Add Pi kitty graphics image display extension
description: Implement a repo-local Pi extension/widget for persistent terminal image display using the kitty graphics protocol. Expose tools for Pi agents to add images or folders/series, navigate next/previous/indexed images, support autodetected streaming/in-memory/tmux passthrough paths, animations/transparency/z-index/background modes where feasible, and factor shared TypeScript kitty graphics protocol utilities for native image-posting integrations.
creator: ms-mac:agent-utils:5nefmjf5xnxv9naq

title: Add Tendril screenshot capture tool to kitty image preview extension
description: Extend the repo Pi kitty image preview extension with a first-party tool that captures the most recent/target screenshot through the tendril CLI into a session-designated folder and auto-shows it in the persistent kitty graphics preview widget. Include session-local screenshot storage, configurable tendril target/output options, docs, and validation.
creator: ms-mac:agent-utils:5nefmjf5xnxv9naq

title: Publish missing v1.0.2 git tag
description: Release bead bd-07984b closed and package.json on origin/main is version 1.0.2 at b844046, but after git fetch --tags the controller checkout does not see tag v1.0.2 (only v1.0.1/v1). Publish or repair the missing v1.0.2 git tag and verify it is visible from the canonical checkout/upstream.
creator: pocket4:agent-utils:pocket4-agent-utils-agnt-ctrl

title: Seed GitHub Pages with tool inventory
description:
Create an initial GitHub Pages site for this repository that publishes a concise inventory of the tools and first-party surfaces available to agents/operators.

Scope:
- Add/enable a minimal GitHub Pages-compatible docs site for the repo.
- Include a tool inventory covering the Cacophony surfaces used by this project, such as bd, agent, msg, scratch, test, build, choices, cron, image generation, Pi loop/self-nudge/self-ops, tmux-cli, Tendril, and relevant repo-local tools.
- Keep the inventory generated or easy to update where practical; avoid duplicating stale long-form docs unnecessarily.
- Document how to preview/build the Pages content locally.
- Ensure the site can be published by GitHub Pages without requiring secrets or local-only state.

Acceptance criteria:
- A docs or Pages entry point exists and renders a tool inventory.
- The repo documents the Pages publishing path and local preview/build command.
- Validation appropriate for the chosen static site setup passes.
creator: pocket4:agent-utils:pocket4-agent-utils-agnt-ctrl
